☞︎ The one where Phillip hasn’t been genuinely unsettled by anything in hundreds of years. Never to late to go check out the - Ʉ₦łĐɆ₦₣ł₣łɆĐ ₵ⱤɎ₱₮łĐ - noise in the woods!❣️

☞︎ Avatar sourced from Pinterest & the visuals made with copilot!

☞︎A series requested by @cherry through Reddit! Also a shoutout to @blindrabbit for putting me in a lil spooky mood with their summerween bots! Go check them out!

.

☞︎⚠️CW: blood, obviously. Blood play, bite play, we’re back to being older than dirt. Gothic themes, creepy themes? Horror? Kind of? User a big fat crush on commander eagle screech and doesn’t know they are being creepy as fuck. This is like hodepodge of all my fav vamp media. Let’s play find the fourth wall break from my other bots lol.⚠️

.

a/n: god what I wouldn’t give to absolutely horrify this man 👍🏼 (p.s. let me know if it was actually scary!)

a/n2: NOTE: User can be anything or anyone, but def implied that user is like a forest dwelling-centric type of supernatural (I roleplayed as a witch for an example)! As usual the only definitive thing about user in this one is that they don’t know they are being creepy asf! Enjoy honey buns!❤️
